UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and application settings, linked to an external authentication system. This entity stores personal preferences and daily macro goals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

externalAuthId.description: Identifier from the external authentication system (e.g., Firebase Auth UID) to link this profile.

email.description: The user's email address, primarily from the external authentication system.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

preferredUnitSystem.description: The user's preferred system for units (e.g., 'metric' or 'imperial').

dailyCalorieGoal.description: The user's daily target for calorie intake.

dailyProteinGoal.description: The user's daily target for protein intake in grams.

dailyCarbGoal.description: The user's daily target for carbohydrate intake in grams.

dailyFatGoal.description: The user's daily target for fat intake in grams.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Defines categories for organizing recipes and ingredients.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the category (e.g., 'Main Dish', 'Vegetables').

description.description: A brief description of the category.

usageType.description: Specifies the primary use of the category (e.g., 'recipe', 'ingredient', 'general').

userId.description: Reference to UserProfile. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Category). Optional, for user-defined categories.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the category was last updated.

Ingredient.title: Ingredient
Ingredient.description: Represents a single ingredient with its nutritional information and default properties.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ingredient entity.

name.description: The common name of the ingredient (e.g., 'Chicken Breast', 'Olive Oil').

description.description: A detailed description of the ingredient.

categoryId.description: Reference to Category for this ingredient. (Relationship: Category 1:N Ingredient)

macrosPer100g.description: Nutritional macros per 100 grams or milliliters of the ingredient.

defaultUnit.description: The default unit for measuring this ingredient (e.g., 'g', 'ml', 'unit', 'cup').

isSystemDefined.description: Indicates if this is a pre-seeded system ingredient or a user-created one.

userId.description: Reference to UserProfile. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Ingredient). Optional, for user-added custom ingredients.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the ingredient was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the ingredient was last updated.

StockItem.title: StockItem
StockItem.description: Represents a user's current inventory of a specific ingredient, including quantity and location.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockItem entity.

currentQuantity.description: The current quantity of the ingredient in stock.

minimumQuantity.description: The minimum desired quantity of the ingredient to keep in stock.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the current and minimum quantities (e.g., 'g', 'ml', 'can', 'bag').

location.description: The physical location where the ingredient is stored (e.g., 'Pantry', 'Fridge', 'Freezer').

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when this stock item was last updated.

Recipe.title: Recipe
Recipe.description: Details of a family recipe, including ingredients, steps, and nutritional information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Recipe entity.

userId.description: Reference to UserProfile, indicating the owner/creator of the recipe. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Recipe)

description.description: A brief description or introduction to the recipe.

history.description: Historical notes or anecdotes about the recipe (e.g., 'Abuela's secret recipe').

categoryId.description: Reference to Category for this recipe. (Relationship: Category 1:N Recipe)

portions.description: The number of servings/portions the recipe yields.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the recipe (e.g., 'Facil', 'Normal', 'Dificil').

chefTip.description: A special tip or recommendation from the chef.

utensils.description: A list of utensils required for the recipe.

imageUrl.description: URL to the hero image of the prepared recipe.

ingredients.description: A list of ingredients required for the recipe, including quantity and unit.

steps.description: A detailed, ordered list of preparation steps for the recipe.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the recipe was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the recipe was last updated.

MealPlan.title: MealPlan
MealPlan.description: Records a recipe planned for a specific meal time and date by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MealPlan entity.

date.description: The date for which the meal is planned (YYYY-MM-DD).

plannedPortions.description: The number of portions of the recipe planned for this meal.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the meal plan was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the meal plan was last updated.

ShoppingListItem.title: ShoppingListItem
ShoppingListItem.description: Represents an item on a user's shopping list, potentially generated from meal plans and stock levels.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ShoppingListItem entity.

quantityNeeded.description: The quantity of the ingredient needed.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the needed quantity (e.g., 'g', 'ml', 'pack').

isPurchased.description: Indicates if the item has been purchased.

notes.description: Additional notes for the shopping item (e.g., 'organic', 'brand X').

generatedFromMealPlanIds.description: References to MealPlan entities from which this shopping item was generated. (Relationship: MealPlan N:N ShoppingListItem)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the shopping list item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the shopping list item was last updated.

purchasedAt.description: Timestamp when the item was marked as purchased.

DailyMacroSummary.title: DailyMacroSummary
DailyMacroSummary.description: Aggregates and tracks a user's daily macronutrient consumption against their goals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyMacroSummary entity.

date.description: The date for which the macro summary is recorded (YYYY-MM-DD).

totalCaloriesConsumed.description: Total calories consumed for the day.

totalProteinConsumed.description: Total protein consumed in grams for the day.

totalCarbsConsumed.description: Total carbohydrates consumed in grams for the day.

totalFatConsumed.description: Total fat consumed in grams for the day.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the daily macro summary was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the daily macro summary was last updated.

definition.description: Stores the profile and application settings for a specific user, where the document ID matches the user's externalAuthId (Firebase Auth UID). Includes denormalized 'externalAuthId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The authenticated user's Firebase Auth UID, which is also the document ID.

definition.description: Globally accessible, system-defined categories for organizing recipes and ingredients. These are read-only for all authenticated users.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: Unique identifier for a system-defined category.

definition.description: User-defined categories for organizing recipes and ingredients, privately owned by the specified user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The authenticated user's Firebase Auth UID, owner of this category.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: Unique identifier for a user-defined category.

definition.description: Globally accessible, system-defined ingredients with nutritional information. These are read-only for all authenticated users.

params.name: ingredientId
params.description: Unique identifier for a system-defined ingredient.

definition.description: User-created custom ingredients with nutritional information, privately owned by the specified user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The authenticated user's Firebase Auth UID, owner of this ingredient.

params.name: ingredientId
params.description: Unique identifier for a user-created ingredient.

definition.description: Inventory items privately owned by the specified user, tracking their ingredient stock levels. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The authenticated user's Firebase Auth UID, owner of this stock item.

params.name: stockItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for a stock item.

definition.description: User-created recipes privately owned by the specified user, including details, ingredients, and steps. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The authenticated user's Firebase Auth UID, owner of this recipe.

definition.description: Meal plan entries privately owned by the specified user, recording planned recipes for specific dates and meal types. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The authenticated user's Firebase Auth UID, owner of this meal plan entry.

params.name: mealPlanId
params.description: Unique identifier for a meal plan entry.

definition.description: Shopping list items privately owned by the specified user, potentially generated from meal plans. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The authenticated user's Firebase Auth UID, owner of this shopping list item.

params.name: shoppingListItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for a shopping list item.

definition.description: Daily macronutrient summaries privately owned by the specified user, tracking consumption against goals. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The authenticated user's Firebase Auth UID, owner of this daily macro summary.

params.name: dailyMacroSummaryId
params.description: Unique identifier for a daily macro summary.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure for 'Cocina Familiar' is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and Path-Based Ownership to ensure security, scalability, and debuggability.

**Authorization Independence:** All user-specific data is structured under `/users/{userId}/` subcollections. For every document within these user-owned subcollections (e.g., UserProfile, user-defined Categories, Ingredients, StockItems, Recipes, MealPlans, ShoppingListItems, DailyMacroSummaries), the `userId` field (or `externalAuthId` for UserProfile) is explicitly stored within the document itself. This 'denormalization' of the owner's ID into each document means that Firestore security rules can directly compare `request.auth.uid` with the document's `userId` field. This eliminates the need for expensive and complex `get()` calls in rules to check parent document ownership, thereby supporting atomic operations (transactions/batches) and making rule debugging straightforward. For instance, a rule for `/users/{userId}/recipes/{recipeId}` can simply check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId` without needing to retrieve any parent document.

**Structural Segregation for Homogeneous Security Posture & QAPs:** To simplify security rules and support Query-As-Permissions (QAPs), entities like `Category` and `Ingredient` are segregated based on their security requirements:
*   `/system_categories` and `/system_ingredients`: These collections store pre-seeded, globally accessible data. All authenticated users have read-only access. This ensures that `list` queries on these collections are naturally secure, returning only data that is publicly available to all users, without any client-side filtering needed.
*   `/users/{userId}/categories` and `/users/{userId}/ingredients`: These subcollections store categories and ingredients created and owned by individual users. Access is restricted to the owning user. `list` operations on these paths will automatically be scoped to the authenticated user's ID, fulfilling QAPs by only returning the user's private data.

**Path-Based Ownership & Clarity:** All private user data leverages a clear hierarchical path structure, `/users/{userId}/{collectionName}/{documentId}`. This makes the ownership explicit in the path itself and allows security rules to leverage the `{userId}` wildcard, ensuring that `request.auth.uid` matches the path's `userId` parameter. This is consistent across `UserProfile`, `StockItem`, `Recipe`, `MealPlan`, `ShoppingListItem`, and `DailyMacroSummary` entities. The consistent use of descriptive wildcards (e.g., `{userId}`, `{recipeId}`) further enhances clarity and debuggability.

This design avoids `get()` calls in rules, ensures all documents in a collection share the same security posture, provides robust authorization for both global and user-specific data, and supports efficient and secure list operations.
